data.description: AMAZON TO CUT THOUSDS MORE CORPORATE JOBS NEXT WEEK AS LAYOFFS CONTINUE – SOURCES
TESLA HAS STARTED DRIVERLESS ROBOTAXI OPERATIONS IN AUSTIN WITH NO IN-CAR SAFETY MONITOR, MARKING A MAJOR ESCALATION IN ELON MUSK’S PUSH TOWARD FULLY AUTONOMOUS TRANSPORT.

data.title: Plymouth Industrial REIT stockholders approve all-cash acquisition by Makarora.
data.description: Today, Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. disclosed that its shareholders have given the green light for the all-cash acquisition of the company.

data.title: OceanFirst Financial Corp. reported lower net income available to common stockholders of $13.1M for Q4 2025, compared to $20.9M last year. Annual net income decreased to $67.1M in 2025 from $96M in 2024.
data.description: Red Bank, New Jersey - OceanFirst Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: OCFC), the parent company of OceanFirst Bank N.A., revealed that for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, they recorded a net income of $13.1 million available to common stockholders, equating to $0.23 per diluted share. This marks a decrease from the same period in the previous year which saw $20.9 million, or $0.36 per diluted share. The net income for the linked quarter was reported at $17.3 million, or $0.30 per diluted share. In terms of the annual performance up till December 31, 2025, the company disclosed a net income available to common stockholders of $67.1 million, translating to $1.17 per diluted share. This displayed a decline from the prior year's figures, which stood at $96.0 million, or $1.65 per diluted share. Further detailed performance metrics can be found in the "Selected Quarterly Financial Data" section.

data.title: Capital One stock falls on Q4 earnings miss, acquiring Brex for $5.15 billion with 50% cash and 50% stock.
data.description: Shares of Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE: COF) fell in after-hours trading following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report, which fell short of expectations. The company announced a deal to purchase fintech firm Brex Inc. for $5.15 billion, with half of the payment in cash and the other half in stock. Capital One disclosed key numbers from the quarter, with the full report accessible on Benzinga.com. Keep an eye on COF stock for further price movements.

data.title: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) announces tax treatment of 2025 dividends for Common Stock. Details in table below.
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) shared the tax treatment of its 2025 dividends for Common Stock. The company's tax return for 2025 is pending, so the details provided below are based on available information as of the release date:- Total dividends per share: $1.50- Ordinary dividends: $1.20- Capital gain distribution: $0.30It is essential to recognize that federal tax laws impact individuals uniquely, and therefore, no specific advice can be given by the company.

data.title: Acadia Realty Trust reports 2025 tax treatment for distributions to shareholders; includes Ordinary and Qualified income, Capital Gain info.
data.description: Rye, New York - Acadia Realty Trust (NYSE: AKR) ("Acadia" or the "Company") has announced the Federal tax treatment for 2025 distributions to holders of its common shares of beneficial interest (CUSIP #004239109) traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "AKR." The distribution record date, payment date, total distribution per share, total income, and various tax boxes are as follows: Record Date: [date], Payment Date: [date], Total Distribution Per Share: $[amount], Total Income: $[amount], Box 1a-Ordinary: $[amount], Box 1b-Qualified: $[amount], Box 5a-199A: $[amount], Box 2a-Capital Gain: $[amount], Box 2b-Unrecaptured Section 1250: $[amount], Box 2f-Section 897: $[amount].

data.title: BitGo's crypto IPO rises 20%, signaling potential for tech giants like SpaceX, OpenAI to consider public offerings.
data.description: BitGo's initial public offering (IPO) has started a promising year for tech companies, with potential public offerings from SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic on the horizon. BitGo's IPO saw a significant 20% surge in its stock price, indicating a positive outlook for upcoming public launches in the tech industry. This suggests a trend of increasing interest in public offerings among companies in the sector.

data.title: Gold prices surged due to Trump's Greenland threats, continue rising despite easing tensions. Potential for further increase.
data.description: The price of gold saw a significant increase in response to President Trump's threats regarding Greenland, but has continued to rise as tensions have begun to ease. Despite this short-term fluctuation, there are compelling long-term factors supporting a bullish outlook on gold.

data.title: Intuitive Surgical's stock rose after surpassing Q4 profit expectations, following a disappointing preannouncement.
data.description: Intuitive Surgical shares surged in after-hours trading on Thursday after reporting a stronger-than-anticipated fourth-quarter profit, which came as a pleasant surprise following a previously disappointing preannouncement. The Robotics company's stock saw a significant increase after it beat expectations for its earnings in Q4.

data.title: Sensata Tech to report Q4, full year 2025 results, and changes in reporting segments. Specifics undisclosed.
data.description: Sensata Technologies, based in Swindon, United Kingdom, has revealed that the earnings release date for their fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results has been set. In addition, the company has announced changes to its reporting segments. This update signifies a significant development for Sensata Technologies as it prepares to share crucial financial information with stakeholders. This news highlights the company's dedication to transparency and accountability in their operations.

data.title: Heritage Commerce Corp declares $0.13 per share dividend, payable on Feb 19, 2026, to shareholders of record on Feb 5.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Heritage Commerce Corp, operating as the parent company of Heritage Bank of Commerce and listed on Nasdaq as HTBK, disclosed a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share for its common stock shareholders. The payment is scheduled for February 19, 2026, for shareholders on record as of February 5, 2026. Remarkably, the company has consistently issued cash dividends every quarter starting from 2013.

data.title: Money market fund assets drop by $30.85B to $7.70T, govt funds decrease by $27.73B. - ICI Report.
data.description: As of January 21, 2026, total money market fund assets saw a decline of $30.85 billion, bringing the total to $7.70 trillion. This data was released by the Investment Company Institute on January 22, 2026. Specifically, government funds within taxable money market funds decreased by $27.73 billion during the same period.

data.title: Ripple CEO predicts cryptocurrency market will hit all-time highs in 2026, despite recent downturns.
data.description: Brad Garlinghouse, the CEO of Ripple, maintains a positive outlook despite recent declines in the crypto market. He anticipates that by 2026, the market will experience significant growth, reaching new highs.

data.title: Former president Trump files $5B lawsuit against JPMorgan in Florida for debanking him following Capitol attack.
data.description: A lawsuit was filed not long after the president made a public declaration on social media about taking legal action against a major bank for terminating their services to him mere weeks subsequent to his followers storming the US Capitol in 2021.

data.title: Supermicro will report Q2 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 3rd, 2026. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT. Webcast link: https://ir.supermicro.com.
data.description: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI), a comprehensive IT solutions provider specializing in AI/ML, HPC, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge technologies, is set to hold a conference call to discuss its second quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT. The webcast can be accessed at https://ir.supermicro.com, with a replay available on the same site shortly after the call. The replay will be accessible for one year.

data.title: Intel beats Q4 estimates: revenue of $13.67 billion, earnings 15 cents per share. Stock near highs, soft outlook weighs.
data.description: Chipmaker Intel Corp (NASDAQ: INTC) released its Q4 financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported Q4 revenue of $13.67 billion, exceeding analyst forecasts of $13.37 billion. Adjusted earnings were reported at 15 cents per share, beating estimates of eight cents per share. Despite a 4% decrease in total revenue from the previous year, Intel stock is currently trading near recent highs. The breakdown of revenue by category included Client services...for more details, read the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cohen & Steers (NYSE: CNS) reported Q4 and full-year results ending Dec. 31, 2025. Earnings release and presentation available on company's website. Conference call scheduled for Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: Yesterday, on January 22, 2026, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. Interested individuals can access the earnings release and presentation on the company's website, www.cohenandsteers.com, under "Company—Investor Relations—Earnings Archive." Additionally, a conference call is scheduled for today, January 23, 2026. For more details, the full story can be found on finance news website Benzinga.com.

data.title: Capital One to acquire Brex for $5.15 billion, combining stock and cash; Brex offers AI-driven finance solutions for businesses.
data.description: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) has recently disclosed its plans to acquire Brex through a deal involving stock and cash, amounting to $5.15 billion. Brex is a tech-savvy financial platform using artificial intelligence to provide efficient finance solutions for businesses. This includes services such as corporate card issuance, automated expense tracking, and secure instant payments. Moreover, Brex employs AI agents for additional assistance in financial activities.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig, P.A. in Tallahassee adds Shareholder George A. Smith to Public Finance & Infrastructure Practice, with over 26 years of experience.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida as of January 22, 2026, the reputable law firm Greenberg Traurig, P.A. is further enhancing its Tallahassee office and Public Finance & Infrastructure Practice by welcoming Shareholder George A. Smith. With over 26 years of experience, Smith's addition marks a strategic move in the firm's continuous growth efforts.
